name: Disaster Response Comm Relay Deployment
description: You are a UAV Operations Specialist deploying a heavy-lift drone carrying a 4G/LTE micro-cell payload to act as a temporary communications relay after a hurricane. Using the deployment brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/relay_deployment_brief.txt, create a mission plan that flies the drone to the designated hilltop, points the directional antenna at the specified heading, loiters for the required duration, and returns to launch. Ensure the vehicle's failsafe parameters are configured to continue the mission if it loses connection to the ground station or RC. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/comm_relay.plan.
